implementation_validation: PASS required before handoff: 545 regression cases, 43 NP cases, 1,221 construction assertions, 168 note/test alignment, eleven final reachable-wrapper zero-weight probes, explicit checks for the two constructor-shadowed labels, historical reachability audits, panel workflow, promotion and release gates, documentation links, and repository verification.
linguistic_confidence: No construction gained linguistic evidence or status. All eleven probes have evidence weight zero. Clause-linking, directional constituency, lexical-stative, passive/permissive, imperative, progressive word-order, and purpose-relation questions remain unresolved. Comment and PerfectiveResultPredicate remain constructor-shadowed.
overclaim_review_scope: Inspected exact constructors and complete parser output for all thirteen remaining no-direct labels. Added probes only for eleven complete-output-reachable labels, preserved code/source and composition mismatches, and refused to fabricate coverage for Comment or PerfectiveResultPredicate.
unresolved_release_questions: Comment remains constructor-present but absent from complete parser output; its planned merge into TopicComment role metadata is not yet implemented.
PerfectiveResultPredicate remains constructor-present but is consumed by PerfectiveVP in complete output.
CompletionThenClause and ConditionResult still require dedicated evidence and composition review rather than reachability-based support.
CompoundDirectionalMotionVP remains narrower than the full sourced directional system and does not settle object order or combination productivity.
DegreeModifiedLexicalStative and NegatedLexicalizedStative remain lexicon-dependent analyses with unresolved productive boundaries.
PassivePermissiveRelation intentionally preserves unresolved passive-versus-permissive readings.
PoliteImperativeClause recognizes only a narrow path-command shape.
ProgressivePlaceQuestion remains order-sensitive and differs from ordinary preverbal-locative questions.
ProgressivePurposeClause and its two child wrappers infer purpose from bounded adjacency without an overt linker.
The full dormant-label review remains due by handoff sequence 23.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused while collection proceeds.
